sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ التَّوَابِلُ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا فِي الْمَطْبَخِ الْعَرَبِيِّ، حَيْثُ تَمْنَحُ الْأَطْبَاقَ هُوِيَّةً فَرِيدَةً تُمَيِّزُهَا عَنْ غَيْرِهَا مِنَ الثَّقَافَاتِ الْعَالَمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Začini se smatraju osnovnim stubom arapske kuhinje, jer jelima daju jedinstven identitet koji ih razlikuje od ostalih svjetskih kultura.
sentences.translationEn: Spices are considered a fundamental pillar of Arab cuisine, as they grant dishes a unique identity that distinguishes them from other world cultures.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ تَأَمَّلْنَا تَارِيخَ تِجَارَةِ الْبُخُورِ وَالْبُهَارَاتِ، لَوَجَدْنَا أَنَّ الْعَرَبَ كَانُوا حَلْقَةَ الْوَصْلِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ بَيْنَ الشَّرْقِ وَالْغَرْبِ لِقُرُونٍ مَضَتْ.
sentences.translation: Ako bismo razmotrili istoriju trgovine tamjanom i začinima, otkrili bismo da su Arapi vijekovima bili vitalna poveznica između Istoka i Zapada.
sentences.translationEn: If we were to contemplate the history of the frankincense and spice trade, we would find that Arabs were the vital link between East and West for centuries past.

sentences.arabic: يَتِمُّ اسْتِخْدَامُ مَزِيجِ "الْبُهَارَاتِ السَّبْعِ" بِدِقَّةٍ لِتَعْزِيزِ نَكْهَةِ اللَّحْمِ الْمَطْهُوِّ بِيُطْءٍ، مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ تَنَاغُمًا بَيْنَ الْحَرَارَةِ وَالْعُطُورِ النَّفَّاذَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mješavina 'sedam začina' koristi se precizno kako bi se poboljšao ukus sporo kuhanog mesa, stvarajući harmoniju između topline i prodornih aroma.
sentences.translationEn: The 'seven spices' blend is used precisely to enhance the flavor of slow-cooked meat, creating a harmony between heat and pungent aromas.

sentences.arabic: وَمَا إِنْ تَدْخُلَ سُوقًا تَقْلِيدِيًّا فِي مَدِينَةٍ عَرِيقَةٍ، حَتَّى تَسْتَقْبِلَكَ رَوَائِحُ الْكَمُّونِ وَالْقِرْفَةِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ الَّتِي تُدَاعِبُ الْحَوَاسَّ.
sentences.translation: Čim uđete na tradicionalnu pijacu u nekom drevnom gradu, dočekaće vas mirisi kima, cimeta i šafrana koji miluju čula.
sentences.translationEn: As soon as you enter a traditional market in an ancient city, you are greeted by the scents of cumin, cinnamon, and saffron that caress the senses.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا الِاهْتِمَامَ بِالتَّفَاصِيلِ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ طَرِيقَةٍ لِلطَّهْيِ، بَلْ هُوَ تَعْبِيرٌ عَنْ كَرَمِ الضِّيَافَةِ وَالِاحْتِفَاءِ بِالْجَوْدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova pažnja posvećena detaljima nije samo način kuhanja, već izraz gostoprimstva i slavljenja kvaliteta.
sentences.translationEn: This attention to detail is not merely a way of cooking, but rather an expression of hospitality and the celebration of quality.

sentences.arabic: خِتَامًا، يَبْقَى السِّرُّ فِي جَوْدَةِ الطَّعَامِ الْعَرَبِيِّ مَكْمُونًا فِي التَّوَازُنِ الدَّقِيقِ بَيْنَ هَذِهِ الْمُكَوِّنَاتِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, tajna kvaliteta arapske hrane ostaje skrivena u preciznoj ravnoteži između ovih prirodnih sastojaka.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, the secret to the quality of Arab food remains hidden in the delicate balance between these natural ingredients.
